name: openclaw-room
description: OpenDeepSea - 本地优先的 ACP 多智能体协作项目管理系统

scripts.dev: OPENDEEPSEA_LOCAL_TOKEN=${OPENDEEPSEA_LOCAL_TOKEN:-openclaw-room-dev-token} concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @openclaw-room/backend" "npm run dev -w @openclaw-room/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @openclaw-room/backend && npm run build -w @openclaw-room/frontend
